node.title: Clarification on Uber Waitlist Mail after OA | SDE-1 India

article.title: Clarification on Uber Waitlist Mail after OA | SDE-1 India
article.content:
To everyone who got the waitlist mail: I just wanted to clarify that the waitlist is basically a silent rejection.

Scenario 1: People who solved 3/3 in just 30–40 minutes got the waitlist mail. Even those who solved only 2 or fewer (even partially) also received the waitlist mail.

Scenario 2: One guy didn’t even open his OA link because of a family emergency, and even he got the same waitlist mail.

I just spoke to an SDE-2 before posting this, and he confirmed that the waitlist mail is an automated message — basically a silent rejection.

Those who were shortlisted for interviews already got their update yesterday and day before. Here I am talking about those who will have interviews scheduled (on 20th August). Wishing them all the best!

For the rest of us who got the waitlist mail — it’s an automated rejection. Time to move on...

post.content:
Uber exists: Let's take OA of everyone who applied.
Shortlist: Na, we don't do that here. 
Tired of Uber's hiring Team, either they send useless automated mails or do not reply at all, never shortlists even after solving all 3 in 30-40 mins.
Stopped applying a long time ago
I got the shortlist email then I got this waitlist? Is it an accident or they just moved me to the waitlist?
LOL!! WHY COMPANIES DO LIKE THIS IF THEY HAVE LIMITED REQUIREMENT.
